error_signature: unable to obtain access token for Shopify
title: Issues obtaining access token for Shopify integration
symptom: Users are unable to obtain an access token for Shopify when trying to connect n8n with the new Dev Dashboard setup.
applies_when: Trying to connect n8n to Shopify
not_this_if: Already have a valid access token
root_cause: Shopify has transitioned to a new Dev Dashboard which requires a different method for obtaining access tokens. The previous methods involving legacy custom apps or OAuth redirects are no longer valid.
fix_steps: Log in to dev.shopify.com and navigate to the Apps section.
Create a new app and configure the necessary permissions.
Install the app to your target store.
Go to Settings > Client credentials to obtain your Client ID and Client Secret.
Make a POST request to the Shopify access token endpoint with the required parameters.
agent_instruction: Follow the steps to create a new app in the Shopify Dev Dashboard and obtain your access token using the Client Credentials Grant flow.
